## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss business updates, explore collaboration opportunities, and plan content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exec closed their biggest SaaS contract with a medical company, highlighting potential in healthcare sector](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a case study on Exec, with Sean agreeing to a 15-30 minute interview](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Exec's new AI-powered QA capability for role-plays offers potential for embedding audio clips in GrowthX content](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Both teams to collaborate on integrating medical-focused content and audio examples into existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

## Topics

### Exec's Business Updates

  - [Hired a new sales representative, started a few weeks ago](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Attending upcoming events: Seattle in 2 weeks, sponsoring sales development conferences](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Closed biggest SaaS contract ever with a medical company (concierge cancer care)](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [CEO of client company considers Exec one of five strategically important vendors](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Exec's Product Development

  - [Strong market reception for their offering](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Facing competition, but confident in their position](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [New capability: AI-powered QA system for role-play scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [Can generate numerous scenarios and audio clips](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [Potential for embedding in content articles](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### GrowthX Content Collaboration

  - [GrowthX to create a case study on Exec](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [Sean agreed to 15-30 minute interview](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [Writer to be assigned and schedule time with Sean](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Opportunity to embed Exec's audio clips in GrowthX articles](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [Focus on medical/healthcare scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [Contentful has audio playback widget for easy integration](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Identify articles suitable for audio clip integration](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Create a pillar article on using Exec for sensitive training scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Update "Best AI Models for Role Plays" article with new information](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Incorporate more medical-related content in future article refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send Sean a list of articles for potential audio clip integration](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Sean to connect with Akshay (Exec's content lead) for creating relevant audio examples](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [GrowthX to schedule case study interview with Sean](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [GrowthX team to discuss strategy for incorporating medical content and audio clips](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Update and enhance the "Best AI Models for Role Plays" article with new Exec capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xa8ytmzd6CFiz5yNZpK37pcd8t8yS7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
